mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pir1.* FROM PRODUCT_INTEREST_RATE pir1 JOIN ( SELECT product_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS max_as_of_date FROM PRODUCT_INTEREST_RATE GROUP BY product_id ) pir2 ON pir1.product_id = pir2.product_id AND pir1.as_of_date = pir2.max_as_of_date ) pir ON p.product_id = pir.product_id
mapper.select:
SELECT p.product_id, p.provider_id, pr.provider_name, p.product_name, p.product_type_code_value_id, p.loan_type_code_value_id, p.repayment_type_code_value_id, p.collateral_type_code_value_id, p.rate_type_code_value_id, p.note, p.add_date, p.end_date, p.updated_at, pir.rate_id, pir.rate_base, pir.rate_min, pir.rate_max, pir.as_of_date FROM PRODUCT p LEFT JOIN PROVIDER pr ON p.provider_id = pr.provider_id
WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO PRODUCT p USING ( SELECT #{p.productId} AS product_id, #{p.providerId} AS provider_id, #{p.productName} AS product_name, #{p.productTypeCodeValueId} AS product_type_code_value_id, #{p.loanTypeCodeValueId} AS loan_type_code_value_id, #{p.repaymentTypeCodeValueId} AS repayment_type_code_value_id, #{p.collateralTypeCodeValueId} AS collateral_type_code_value_id, #{p.rateTypeCodeValueId} AS rate_type_code_value_id, #{p.note} AS note, #{p.endDate} AS end_date FROM dual ) s ON (p.product_id = s.product_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET p.provider_id = s.provider_id, p.product_name = s.product_name, p.product_type_code_value_id = s.product_type_code_value_id, p.loan_type_code_value_id = s.loan_type_code_value_id, p.repayment_type_code_value_id = s.repayment_type_code_value_id, p.collateral_type_code_value_id = s.collateral_type_code_value_id, p.rate_type_code_value_id = s.rate_type_code_value_id, p.note = s.note, p.end_date = s.end_date, p.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( product_id, provider_id, product_name, product_type_code_value_id, loan_type_code_value_id, repayment_type_code_value_id, collateral_type_code_value_id, rate_type_code_value_id, note, add_date, end_date, updated_at ) VALUES ( s.product_id, s.provider_id, s.product_name, s.product_type_code_value_id, s.loan_type_code_value_id, s.repayment_type_code_value_id, s.collateral_type_code_value_id, s.rate_type_code_value_id, s.note, SYSTIMESTAMP, s.end_date, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT_INTEREST_RATE ( rate_id, product_id, rate_base, rate_min, rate_max, as_of_date, created_at ) VALUES ( PRODUCT_INTEREST_RATE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{p.productId}, #{p.rateBase}, #{p.rateMin}, #{p.rateMax}, #{p.asOfDate}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
